chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Next we will talk about two special tags sub and sub

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: These are short forms of subscript and superscript

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: I am from science background and math background

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So for me, the meaning of subscript and superscript is very clear

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In fact, many JEE students will relate

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: But maximum students may not have seen subscript and superscript

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: They may have seen in their childhood, in biology books, in physics books

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: But usually, if we used to study math in childhood

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: We used to see some formulas in which we used to write a plus b whole square

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Or a square, or c square, or 24 square

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So in this way, we used to write 2 for this square

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: It is also called power in math

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So the 2 that we used to write was a little smaller in size

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And it used to come above our main number

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: That is, if I write a plus b of a little bigger size

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Then 2 is always going to be smaller in size than a and b

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And what is 2? What is power? It always goes above the number

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So these numbers or things

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Which are a little smaller in size and come above my main content

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: We call this a superscript in technical terms

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Super means above

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So you can remember it like this

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Super means which comes above and is smaller in size

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Now, just like superscript is small in size and comes above

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Similarly, there is another version of this which we call subscript

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Subscript is small in size but comes below the main content

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: For example, we used to read a lot of formulas in science

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In childhood, we must have read the formula of glucose

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: C6H12O6

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So what used to happen in this is that these numbers are smaller than the main content

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And this 6 will be smaller than this C

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: If I have to write 6 here, it will be big

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: While this 6 will be a little small

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: If I want to write the formula of oxygen, chemical formula

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Then it will be O2, in which 2 is very small in comparison to this O

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And comes below

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: If I write the formula of water, then H2O will come in it

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In which 2 will be smaller than H and O

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So whenever we have to write such content

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In which our size of the text is small

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And it comes below

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So we call it subscript

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Like we can see its examples here

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: To write superscript, let's say I have to write something like this

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So to write superscript, we use the SUP tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: This tag is something like this

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: This is my opening tag, this is my closing tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And in between, whichever number or content I have to superscript

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: We are writing that

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So if I write A

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And then I write 2 in the SUP tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So what is going to come in my output

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In the output, A will come bigger

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Like this, but this 2 will come a little higher

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And will be small

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: If we talk about subscript, let's say I wrote H2O

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So here 2 is smaller than my normal H

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And if I have to write H2O in HTML

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Then I have to write something like this

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In which my H is a normal size element

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: My O is also a normal size element

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And 2 is coming here

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: A little smaller in size and below

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So in this way, H2O will be printed on my screen

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Let's write this in code once

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: I will make a heading tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: I am going to write A2 in it

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So I wrote A first

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: I will make my super tag by nesting it inside it

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Let's save it and run it once

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So it will be something like this

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In which square will be put on A

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Here is an extra space

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So let's refresh it again

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So my A2 is made

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In the same way, I can write H2O in a similar way

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And I will put a subscript tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In which I will write H2O

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Let's save it and run it

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So in this way, H2O will be displayed on my screen

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Now one more interesting thing

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: This H1 and this SUB

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: H1 is my main tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: In which this SUB is nested

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: We have already talked a little about nested tags

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Those tags that come inside each other

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So if SUB comes inside H1

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So the SUB tag is nested inside H1 tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And if we do parent-child relation

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: We have discussed that a little

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: The one that is on the outside is called parent

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: The one that is inside is called child

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So my H1 tag is in the parent relationship

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And my SUB tag is in the child relationship

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And there is another tag inside SUB

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So if I want to make these two italic

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Or if I want to underline these two

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So in this way, I will remove this two

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: I will write it here

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Let's save it and run it

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So H2O is displayed

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: 2 is my subscript

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: But 2 is also underlined

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So this is my parent on the outside

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And SUB is its child

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: And SUB also has another child

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Whose name is underlined tag

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: So in this way, nesting happens in HTML

chunks.title: Sup Sub Tags
chunks.text: Which we are seeing many times in real life

text: Next we will talk about two special tags sub and sub These are short forms of subscript and superscript I am from science background and math background So for me, the meaning of subscript and superscript is very clear In fact, many JEE students will relate But maximum students may not have seen subscript and superscript They may have seen in their childhood, in biology books, in physics books But usually, if we used to study math in childhood We used to see some formulas in which we used to write a plus b whole square Or a square, or c square, or 24 square So in this way, we used to write 2 for this square It is also called power in math So the 2 that we used to write was a little smaller in size And it used to come above our main number That is, if I write a plus b of a little bigger size Then 2 is always going to be smaller in size than a and b And what is 2? What is power? It always goes above the number So these numbers or things Which are a little smaller in size and come above my main content We call this a superscript in technical terms Super means above So you can remember it like this Super means which comes above and is smaller in size Now, just like superscript is small in size and comes above Similarly, there is another version of this which we call subscript Subscript is small in size but comes below the main content For example, we used to read a lot of formulas in science In childhood, we must have read the formula of glucose C6H12O6 So what used to happen in this is that these numbers are smaller than the main content And this 6 will be smaller than this C If I have to write 6 here, it will be big While this 6 will be a little small If I want to write the formula of oxygen, chemical formula Then it will be O2, in which 2 is very small in comparison to this O And comes below If I write the formula of water, then H2O will come in it In which 2 will be smaller than H and O So whenever we have to write such content In which our size of the text is small And it comes below So we call it subscript Like we can see its examples here To write superscript, let's say I have to write something like this So to write superscript, we use the SUP tag This tag is something like this This is my opening tag, this is my closing tag And in between, whichever number or content I have to superscript We are writing that So if I write A And then I write 2 in the SUP tag So what is going to come in my output In the output, A will come bigger Like this, but this 2 will come a little higher And will be small If we talk about subscript, let's say I wrote H2O So here 2 is smaller than my normal H And if I have to write H2O in HTML Then I have to write something like this In which my H is a normal size element My O is also a normal size element And 2 is coming here A little smaller in size and below So in this way, H2O will be printed on my screen Let's write this in code once I will make a heading tag I am going to write A2 in it So I wrote A first I will make my super tag by nesting it inside it Let's save it and run it once So it will be something like this In which square will be put on A Here is an extra space So let's refresh it again So my A2 is made In the same way, I can write H2O in a similar way And I will put a subscript tag In which I will write H2O Let's save it and run it So in this way, H2O will be displayed on my screen Now one more interesting thing This H1 and this SUB H1 is my main tag In which this SUB is nested We have already talked a little about nested tags Those tags that come inside each other So if SUB comes inside H1 So the SUB tag is nested inside H1 tag And if we do parent-child relation We have discussed that a little The one that is on the outside is called parent The one that is inside is called child So my H1 tag is in the parent relationship And my SUB tag is in the child relationship And there is another tag inside SUB So if I want to make these two italic Or if I want to underline these two So in this way, I will remove this two I will write it here Let's save it and run it So H2O is displayed 2 is my subscript But 2 is also underlined So this is my parent on the outside And SUB is its child And SUB also has another child Whose name is underlined tag So in this way, nesting happens in HTML Which we are seeing many times in real life
